tools.name: respond
tools.description: Send a final response back to the caller and end the agent turn.

metadata.description: Optional metadata to attach to the response.

tools.name: request_input
tools.description: Pause and request input from the caller before continuing.

question.description: The question or prompt to show the caller.

tools.name: await_signal
tools.description: Pause and wait for an external signal before continuing.

await_review.description: Start or continue a review session. Supports any review target — a plan, a class, a diff, a PR, final code, or anything else worth reviewing. The reviewer may ask clarifying questions before delivering feedback; respond to each question to advance the review. Call with the same referenceId to continue an existing session.

referenceId.description: Tracks the conversation across multiple calls.

workspace.description: Absolute path to the workspace or repository root to review.

baseBranch.description: Git branch, tag, or commit to diff against (e.g. 'main', 'HEAD~1'). When omitted, the review covers staged/unstaged changes only.

context.description: On the first call: the review scope (what to review, concerns, exclusions). On follow-up calls: the answer to the reviewer's last question.

tools.name: respond
tools.description: Send a response or finding back to the caller. The session parks until the next call arrives — never self-terminate.

metadata.description: Optional metadata to attach to the response.

tools.name: request_input
tools.description: Pause and request input from the caller before continuing.

question.description: The question or prompt to show the caller.
